dialog.stepLabel: Abby: "Both of those flavors sound really delicious, {PlayerName}! ..."

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Both of those flavors sound really delicious, {PlayerName}! Which one do you like better?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: From what Gianluca said earlier, we can probably only choose one for this week...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Sounds like a satisfying flavor that'll make your belly full, doesn't it...? Let's go find Alba and ask her if she wants to give it a try!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hee-hee, that's the sweet tooth talking right there... That'll make up for not getting a Canned Surprise! Let's go find Chengxi and ask him if he wants to give it a try!

dialog.stepLabel: Abby: "Uh-uh... Stuff like this is too weird to be on the cafeteria..."

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Uh-uh... Stuff like this is too weird to be on the cafeteria menu.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: How about we write something for that suggestion box, {PlayerName}? Ask them to make something that's actually tasty...

items.speaker: Distant Voice
items.text: Ahem... You there! I noticed you just had a Squeezy Jelly, no?

dialog.stepLabel: Chengxi: "Oh, so this is what it tastes like... It sure is sweet and c..."

items.speaker: Chengxi
items.text: Oh, so this is what it tastes like... It sure is sweet and crispy. I bet it's got a high-calorie count as well.

items.speaker: Chengxi
items.text: Thanks for letting me taste something new!

items.speaker: Chengxi
items.text: Expanding my intellectual horizons is the reason I got into Startorch Academy in the first place!

items.speaker: Alba
items.text: Maybe I'll choose this flavor of Squeezy Jelly next time I go to the frostlands with my professor.

items.speaker: Alba
items.text: Thank you. You're a great Duelist yourself. Here's hoping... there's a chance we get to play again.
